3223720.name: MIRO Demo
3223720.description:
In the demo version, you can play three introdutory star clusters of MIRO, learn the base mechanics and find interesting places and creatures. You are able to collect resources and craft upgrades, experimenting with different playstyles on multiple planets in these regions.

Explore procedural worlds, filled with life and secrets to be discovered. Each planet is unique, with procedural fauna and flora.

The full version will contain 10 clusters in total, and many more secrets to discover aboard the space ship.
3223720.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
